creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to tech-lists from comment #162)
I am in the same boat. Presently, I am stuck on FreeBSD 11. I cannot move past this version due to this bug. Considering that it was not present in versions <= 11 and has not been corrected in version 12, I doubt that it is of any priority to anyone. At the rate this is going, I will have to invest in a new distro.
